base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_escape_sequence_death_timer — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 metroid. Escape countdown — 20-frame explosion sequence on timer after Mother Brain defeat. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Escape countdown — 20-frame explosion sequence on timer after Mother Brain defeat; Samus must reach escape ship before 0; iconic series tension mechanic
